title: Yellow Snow
description: Have you ever wanted to taste yellow snow but were too scared to do it in real life? Don't worry, this mod will solve all your previously mentioned problems.
body:
Hello Everyone

This Mod will revolutionize the Market as it is with it's addition to Yellow Snowballs

 Surprisingly, they can also be weaponized as a stunning projectile so they might actually be of good use

I posted this mod a week ago on the Fabric Discord Server and the reactions were all very positive (also shown in the gallery)

Have Fun, and I sincerely apologize
